name: What damages can I claim if AI Overview defames my Phoenix law firm?
description: Lost revenue mainly; punitive hard due to immunity.

mainEntity.name: What damages can I claim if AI Overview defames my Phoenix law firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost revenue mainly; punitive hard due to immunity.
acceptedAnswer.description: Compensatory for lost clients, punitive if malice shown, but Section 230 caps most.[4] Key factors: Quantifiable losses; reputational harm proof; rare exceptions. Use economic experts. AZ defamation statutes apply.
